title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Baaghi: A Rebel for Love
subTitle: The son of a colonel falls in love with a young woman from a brothel. However, their love soon becomes synonymous with rebellion because of social taboos.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: Apaharan
subTitle: Ajay, an aspiring policeman, borrows money from a moneylender to pursue his dream. However, he is unable to repay the loan on time and decides to be a part of a kidnapping scheme.

title: Dil Aashna Hai
subTitle: Laila, a cabaret dancer who grew up in a brothel, gets a call from her dying mother divulging that she was adopted. So, she takes the help of her lover, Karan, in finding out who her real parents are.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
subTitle: After graduating from a university in India, an unemployed man decides to try his luck in New York and gets caught in a love triangle between an equally unlucky girl and a rich girl.

title: Aakhree Raasta
subTitle: A man is falsely accused of his wife's murder and imprisoned. When he sets out to seek revenge, he finds a police officer on his trail who turns out to be his own son.

title: Mr. India
subTitle: Hoping to make the world a better place for orphaned children, a compassionate street musician takes on a power-hungry crime boss with the help of a cloaking device.

title: Singh Is Kinng
subTitle: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

title: Singh Is Kinng
subTitle: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

title: Prithviraj Chauhan
subTitle: Prithviraj Chauhan, a great ruler, strives to overcome multiple challenges in order to defeat his enemies and ensure peace in his kingdom.

title: Baazi
subTitle: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

title: Krishna Sudama
subTitle: Sudama, Lord Krishna's childhood friend, is very poor. After a gap of many years, Sudama wants to meet Lord Krishna but faces many obstacles in reuniting with his friend.

title: Issaq
subTitle: In the kaleidoscopic cityscapes of Banaras, a soul-stirring Romeo-and-Juliet-esque romance kindles between two young individuals from rival mafia families.

title: Kyon Ki...? It's Fate
subTitle: Anand loses his sanity after unintentionally killing his fiancee. During his treatment in a mental asylum, his doctor, Tanvi, falls for him, but her father does not approve of their match.

title: Kurukshetra
subTitle: ACP Prithviraj, an honest man, arrests Chief Minister Baburao's son for raping a woman. Consequently, Baburao leaves no stone unturned to get revenge against Prithviraj.

title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
subTitle: Pooja divorces her husband for being unfaithful and gets a job as secretary to a film star. The two fall in love, before her ex-husband returns and she finds herself confused between the two men.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Nadiya Ke Paar
subTitle: Chandan, a farmer's nephew, is in love with Gunja, his sister-in-law's sibling. However, when her sister dies in an accident, Gunja is expected to marry Chandan's brother.

title: Singh Is Kinng
subTitle: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

title: Singh Is Kinng
subTitle: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

title: Gunda Gardi
subTitle: Karan Singh, a police officer, is called in to help arrest Kalicharan and Narshima, two brothers who have caused problems all over the city.

title: Dand-Nayak
subTitle: Bankhelal, who started his career by selling milk, soon becomes a famous ruthless criminal. However, the only person he fears is Inspector Vishal as he has sworn to apprehend him.

title: Paltan
subTitle: Lieutenant Colonel Raj Singh Yadav, along with his group of soldiers, sets out to protect the Nathu La Pass from the Chinese while having to deal with the pain of being away from their loved ones.

title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
subTitle: A businessman disowns his spoiled son, Aditya, after he marries a girl from a rival family. Upon discovering his father's lung cancer, Aditya resolves to change for the better.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
subTitle: Separated at birth, Kishen and Kanhaiya grow up in different worlds, one in opulent luxury, the other in poverty. Fate reunites them as they fight together to end injustice.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Aaj Ka Arjun
subTitle: A ruthless landlord exiles Bheema due to his rebellion against him. However, when his nephew is abducted, Bheema sets out to gain the support of the villagers and rescue the boy.

title: Chaalbaaz
subTitle: Anju endures mistreatment at home, whereas her long-separated twin Manju boldly navigates life's challenges. By some quirk of fate, they end up trading places, and their worlds erupt in chaos.

title: Sandwich
subTitle: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.
